abstractHtml:
Animal and Human Health series. General editor G. C. Brander. First two titles: The Control of Disease, 1977, 128 pp., 13 illus. By George C. Brander and Peter R. Ellis. Price U.K., limp cover £2.50. Viral and Bacterial Zoonoses, 1977, 120 pp., 8 illus. By Sir Christopher Andrewes and John R. Walton. Price U.K., limp cover £2.50. Both published by Baillière Tindall (London) on 26 January 1977.

Rabies: the Facts, 1977, 113 pp. Edited by C. Kaplan. Published in hardback by the Oxford University Press on 10 March 1977. Price U.K. £1.95. Published in paperback by Corgi Books on 25 March 1977. Price U. K. 75p.
